overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character exploring a gothic castle courtyard at night. The character walks steadily from a paved fountain area into a grassy garden illuminated by warm lanterns, approaching a distant stone archway.

agents.ego_description: character in dark wizard robes with red hair walking steadily along the paved path beside a large illuminated fountain

entered.detail: large stone fountain with golden dragon sculpture and flowing water, illuminated by warm lanterns
tall stone castle wall with arched windows and gothic architecture
castle building facade behind the fountain with lit windows
wet reflective stone paving with moss between cracks
tall leafy trees surrounding the courtyard perimeter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gothic castle courtyard at night, with the character walking along a cobblestone path. A prominent dragon fountain with golden accents stands to the right, illuminated by warm lanterns, while tall castle walls frame the scene on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy inner courtyard with stone benches

events.description: character steps off the cobblestone path onto the grassy lawn as the fountain passes out of view behind

agents.ego_description: continuing forward with a slight left turn, moving deeper into the courtyard garden away from the fountain

entered.detail: stone seating bench along the edge of the grass area
grassy courtyard area with scattered stone paving stones
illuminated stone archway entrance in the castle wall ahead
small glowing lantern lights scattered across the lawn

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the fountain, the character transitions onto a grassy lawn with stone benches visible to the right. A distant illuminated archway becomes visible ahead, while the cobblestone path recedes to the left and the castle wall draws closer on the left side.

agents.ego_description: walking across the lawn toward a distant lit archway, approaching a small glowing object on the ground

entered.detail: small bright glowing light or collectible item on the grass ahead

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds deeper into the courtyard where the grass dominates the foreground. The stone bench and perimeter lanterns fade from view as the character approaches a small glowing object on the lawn, with the distant archway still visible ahead and the castle wall now prominent on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle courtyard at night, transitioning from a structured paved area into an open, lantern-lit garden. It begins on a cobblestone path beside a golden dragon fountain, with tall castle walls framing the character's steady forward progress. As the character moves away from the fountain, the terrain shifts from stone to a grassy lawn where stone benches appear to the right and a distant illuminated archway emerges on the horizon. The scene then expands deeper into the greenery as the perimeter lanterns fade from view, before finally focusing on a small glowing object on the lawn with the castle wall remaining prominent on the left.
